title: OpenAI to provide Japan gov't with advanced cybersecurity AI model
description: OpenAI, the U.S. developer of the artificial intelligence chatbot ChatGPT, said Thursday it will provide the Japanese government and some companies with an AI model featuring advanced cybersecurity capabilities. title: If AI can translate instantly, why learn another language?
description: From live speech translation in video calls to auto-dubbing on TikTok, the technology to dissolve language barriers has arrived. Real-time translation powered by artificial intelligence (AI) is now embedded in everyday life. title: Cursor Hits $3 Billion Annual Sales Rate Ahead of SpaceX Deal
description: Cursor’s annualized revenue hit $3 billion in late April, according to a person familiar with the matter, indicating growing demand for the company’s AI coding software ahead of an expected deal to be acquired by Elon Musk’s SpaceX. The artificial intelligence startup’s annualized revenue, which projects sales for a 12-month-period based on recent performance, topped $2 billion in February, Bloomberg previously reported. Cursor now has more than 3,000 customers paying at least $100,000 each for

title: Artificial Intelligence glitch at Arizona college graduation sparks uproar from crowd
description: Glendale Community College students booed after an AI system meant to announce graduate names glitched and skipped hundreds of students during the commencement ceremony.
content:
I'll be honest with you guys, I don't know what to make of my feelings toward artificial intelligence, because my mood on the subject changes by the day.
Some days, I find myself thinking, "this isn't so bad. It's nice to get a helping hand from AI."... [2599 chars]

title: Ohio Senate passes AI deepfake and child exploitation bill
description: The Ohio Senate has approved a bill that would govern use of artificial intelligence, establishing protections against deepfakes, identity theft and criminalizing AI-generated child pornography.
content:
COLUMBUS, Ohio – A bill approved in the Ohio Senate would govern use of artificial intelligence, establishing protections against deepfakes, identity theft and criminalizing AI-generated child pornography.
